title: Negative Numbers
summary: Negative numbers represent quantities below zero, opposite directions, deficits, or signed change.
claim: Negative numbers represent quantities below a defined zero point, directed opposites, deficits, or inverse positions on an ordered scale.

proof_layers.summary: Negative numbers represent quantities below zero, opposite directions, deficits, or signed change.
proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: A number line with a zero reference permits positions on opposite sides.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: A number line with a zero reference permits positions on opposite sides.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within signed arithmetic.
